zh.Sandford, Devonshire, England: 英國英格蘭戴文桑德福德
zh.Poltimore Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文波爾莫
zh.Sandford, Peverell, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文桑德福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Amicia Bolhay於1280年出生在英國戴文培維勒爾時，她的父親James de Bolhay40歲，母親Avice Of Poltimore Manor22歲。她和John Cobham至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1335年在英國可瓦爾享年55歲。

zh-hans.Sandford, Peverell, Devon, England: 英国英格兰戴文桑德福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Amicia Bolhay于1280年出生在英国戴文培維勒爾时，她的父亲James de Bolhay40岁，母亲Avice Of Poltimore Manor22岁。她和John Cobham至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1335年在英国可瓦爾享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bolhay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon and Cornwall): from Bowhay Farm in Exminster (Devon) or Bowhayes Farm in Culmstock (Devon). The placenames derive from Middle English boue, bogh ‘bow, arch, bend’ + wei ‘road, way’ (Old English boga, weg).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Amicia Bolhay was born in 1280, in Peverell, Devon, England, her father, James de Bolhay, was 40 and her mother, Avice Of Poltimore Manor, was 22. She had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with John Cobham. She died in 1335, in Cornwall, England, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Amicia Bolhay est née en 1280, à Peverell, Devon, Angleterre, son père, James de Bolhay, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Avice Of Poltimore Manor, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec John Cobham. Elle est décédée en 1335, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Amicia Bolhay 1280 in Peverell, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James de Bolhay 40 und ihre Mutter Avice Of Poltimore Manor 22. Sie hatte mit John Cobham mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1335 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Cornwall, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Amicia Bolhay è nata il nel 1280 nel Peverell, Devon, England, sua padre, James de Bolhay, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Avice Of Poltimore Manor, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con John Cobham. Morì nel 1335, nel Cornwall, England, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Amicia Bolhayが1280年にイギリスデボンペバーエルで生まれた時，父James de Bolhayは40歳，母Avice Of Poltimore Manorは22歳であった。彼女はJohn Cobhamとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1335年にイギリスコルンワルで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Amicia Bolhay(이)가 1280년 영국 데폰 p에버에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James de Bolhay(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Avice Of Poltimore Manor(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 John Cobham(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1335년 영국 코른월에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Amicia Bolhay nasceu em 1280, em Peverell, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, James de Bolhay, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Avice Of Poltimore Manor, tinha 22 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com John Cobham. Ela faleceu em 1335, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Amicia Bolhay родилась в 1280 г. в местности пивирэлл, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени James de Bolhay было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Avice Of Poltimore Manor, 22. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от John Cobham. Она умерла в 1335 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Amicia Bolhay nació en 1280, en Peverell, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, James de Bolhay, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Avice Of Poltimore Manor, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con John Cobham. Murió en 1335, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años.
